page.title: Personal data
page.subtitle: Your own profile, schedule, KPI, Talent Group, and account preferences.

overview.title: Overview
overview.summary: Readiness and today's own-data snapshot from Self-Service.

work.title: My Work
work.summary: Read-only shifts and events assigned to your own profile.
work.boundary: Official shifts are work plans, not attendance or payroll.

workShifts.title: My Work Shifts
workShifts.summary: Read-only view of your official work shifts.

kpi.title: My KPI
kpi.summary: Read-only official KPI for your current staff or operational assignment.
kpi.boundary: Actual results do not automatically determine commission or payroll.

events.title: My Events
events.summary: Read-only view of your directly assigned events.

talentGroups.title: My Talent Groups
talentGroups.summary: Read-only view of your active Talent Group memberships.

account.title: Account
account.summary: Account information with self-service locale and timezone preferences.

kpiStatusSummary.title: Actual status summary
kpiStatusSummary.readOnlySource: Status is based on manager-entered daily actuals. Read-only.

events.windowCopy: Showing recent events from the previous {{recentPastDays}} days and upcoming events for the next {{upcomingDays}} days ({{windowStartAt}} to {{windowEndAt}}).
events.truncatedCopy: Some events are not shown because the bounded Stage 1 list limit was reached.

talentGroups.groupsTruncated: Showing the first {{maxGroups}} active Talent Groups.
talentGroups.managersTruncated: Showing the first {{maxManagers}} managers for this group.
talentGroups.membersTruncated: Showing the first {{maxMembers}} members for this group.

account.preferencesSummary: Only locale and timezone can be updated here.
account.passwordInstruction: To change your password, contact IT/Admin.
account.operationsNote: For email, phone, address, legal, contract, or staff record changes, contact the responsible HR/Admin/IT team.

empty.workShiftsMessage: No official shifts are available for your profile yet.
empty.kpiCurrentTitle: No official KPI is published for the current period.
empty.kpiCurrentMessage: If you believe a KPI allocation is missing, contact your manager or admin.
empty.kpiCurrentWithPreviousMessage: Your latest previous KPI is shown below for read-only context. If you believe a current KPI allocation is missing, contact your manager or admin.
empty.kpiHistoryMessage: Previous KPI history is not available yet.
empty.kpiSelectedHistoryTitle: No previous KPI for selected period
empty.kpiSelectedHistoryMessage: Choose another previous period if available.
empty.eventsMessage: No directly assigned events are available for your profile yet.
empty.talentGroupsMessage: No active Talent Group memberships are available for your linked internal Talent yet.

errors.currentPersonNotLinkedMessage: Your account is authenticated, but no staff profile is linked for self-service yet.
errors.profileNotOperationalMessage: Your employment profile is not currently eligible to use Self-Service. Contact HR/Admin if this needs to be reviewed.
errors.profileNotOperationalHelper: Access is checked by the people system. This screen only shows the status and does not repair data.
errors.currentPersonLoadMessage: Your profile could not be loaded.
errors.workShiftsMessage: Your work shifts could not be loaded.
errors.kpiMessage: Your official KPI could not be loaded.
errors.eventsMessage: Your events could not be loaded.
errors.talentGroupsMessage: Your Talent Groups could not be loaded.
